global_description: A small, compact songbird with a distinctive black cap and white face. It has olive-green upperparts and white underparts, with a short, rounded tail. The wings are dark with two white wing bars, and the beak is short and pointed.

part_details.head: Black cap covering the top, contrasting with a white face and dark eye.
part_details.wings: Dark with two distinct white wing bars, short and rounded.
part_details.tail: Short, rounded, matching the olive-green upperparts.
part_details.beak: Short, pointed, suitable for insect feeding.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head, contrasting with the white face.
The white wing bars are positioned transversely across the dark wings.
The short tail extends from the olive-green body.
